summary: Iteration 63: Tested three features - (1) PhotoLightbox gallery, (2) Profile page mobile layout fixes, (3) Navbar wordmark size. All features verified working. PhotoLightbox fully tested with all UI elements. Profile page mobile layout has cream bg, 2x2 grid stats, disc icon for setup, founding member without emoji, streak pill positioned correctly (when user has streak), Stripe badge only shows for own profile. Navbar wordmark has inline style with 160px width.

code_verified_not_ui_tested: NoteCard: PhotoLightbox integration in PostCards.js line 227-240 - Code verified, no test data (no posts with images in DB)

features.thumbnails: Bottom strip with amber ring on active

profile_page_mobile.stats_layout: grid grid-cols-2 on mobile, flex on desktop (sm:flex)

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about DialogContent requiring DialogTitle - accessibility issue but not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: Created test listing (Fleetwood Mac - Rumours, id: 5a018c22-5f69-4569-8847-020b10f223cb) with 3 photos under katieintheafterglow user to test PhotoLightbox
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 verified three features: (1) PhotoLightbox at /app/frontend/src/components/PhotoLightbox.js - tested via ListingDetailModal, all elements work (counter, close, arrows, thumbnails, escape-to-close). Used in ListingDetailModal and PostCards NoteCard. (2) ProfilePage mobile layout at /app/frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.js - cream background, 2x2 grid stats, disc icon for setup, founding member badge without emoji, streak pill inline with username (requires user with streak>0 to see). (3) Navbar wordmark at /app/frontend/src/components/Navbar.js line 195 - img has inline style minWidth: 160px, width: 160px. Stripe badge correctly shows only for own profile (isOwnProfile gated). testprofile user has 0 streak so streak pill not visible but code is correct. No NOTE posts with images exist in DB so NoteCard lightbox was code-verified only.
